guidance: Target 149 GW by 2032 including 60 GW renewables.
NTPC Green to add 8 GW each in FY27 and FY28.
insights: Installed capacity ~89,108 MW; record 9,619 MW added in FY26 (RE 4,738 MW).
Over 32 GW under construction; final dividend ₹3.5 (plus two ₹2.75 interims).
concall.orderExecution: 32 GW under construction (thermal, hydro, RE) commissions through FY27-FY32 at ~9.5-10 GW/yr, increasingly RE-led.

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
